title: About

modal.fullSummary: AI/ML Engineer with 4+ years of production experience designing and shipping LLM-powered applications, RAG systems, and agentic AI pipelines for enterprise clients across FMCG, IoT, and SaaS. Proficient across the full AI stack — from OpenAI API, Anthropic Claude, LangChain, and LangGraph through to FastAPI backends, Docker deployments, and vector database integration. Experienced in multi-agent frameworks, fine-tuning workflows, and building AI-first products end-to-end.
achievements: Built an LLM-powered NL-to-SQL engine querying a 14M-row FMCG dataset, eliminating manual reporting entirely and saving hundreds of analyst-hours per month.
Architected an AI-first Sales Intelligence Chat platform with multi-turn conversation memory and real-time data rendering, deployed in production for enterprise FMCG clients.
Reduced out-of-stock events by 20% through time-windowed stockout forecasting and an automated alerting system across multiple distribution networks.
Delivered RGM AI pipelines for EBM, PMI, RB-PK, and Unilever — directly driving double-digit commercial growth across product categories.
Boosted HVAC energy forecasting accuracy by 25% using an ARIMA + LSTM + XGBoost ensemble, integrated into a live IoT monitoring platform at Sense Digital.
